# Phase 11: AI Field-Level Descriptions Verification Report

**Phase Goal:** Users can read plain-English descriptions of every column in high-quality datasets, generated by AI with appropriate transparency
**Verified:** 2026-02-27T23:15:00Z
**Status:** passed
**Re-verification:** No — initial verification

---

## Goal Achievement

### Observable Truths

**Plan 01 truths (FIELD-01, FIELD-04)**

| # | Truth | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|--------|----------|
| 1 | Schema V4 adds ai_description column to columns table | VERIFIED | `PRAGMA table_info(columns)` confirms ai_description present; `PRAGMA user_version` = 4 |
| 2 | get_field_eligible_datasets() returns B+ datasets with unenriched columns | VERIFIED | db.py lines 473-502: SQL joins audit_scores on letter_grade IN ('A','B'), HAVING unenriched count > 0 |
| 3 | update_column_ai_descriptions() writes AI descriptions to columns.ai_description | VERIFIED | db.py lines 505-538: exact + case-insensitive UPDATE, commits once |
| 4 | FieldEnrichmentResult Pydantic model guarantees structured output from Claude API | VERIFIED | models.py lines 60-65: class FieldEnrichmentResult with field_descriptions list; runtime test passed |
| 5 | enrich_fields() sends all non-system columns per dataset in one API call (or chunked batches of ~30) | VERIFIED | client.py lines 201-280: single call <= batch_size, chunking loop > batch_size, merged results |
| 6 | System columns (OBJECTID, Shape, GlobalID, etc.) are excluded from enrichment prompts | VERIFIED | prompts.py lines 158-163: SYSTEM_COLUMNS set with 14 entries; is_system_column() filter applied in enrich_fields() |
| 7 | Sample data values are fetched at enrichment time and included in prompts | VERIFIED | client.py lines 238-247: _fetch_sample_values() called, results attached to each column dict |
| 8 | build_field_system_prompt() is wired into enrich_fields() for jurisdiction-aware enrichment | VERIFIED | client.py line 252: `system_prompt = build_field_system_prompt(jurisdiction)` |
| 9 | insert_enrichment() writes through to datasets.ai_description | VERIFIED | db.py lines 577-581: `UPDATE datasets SET ai_description = ? WHERE id = ?` after INSERT OR REPLACE |
| 10 | Dead get_datasets_by_jurisdiction() removed from db.py | VERIFIED | Grep confirms zero occurrences of get_datasets_by_jurisdiction in db.py |
| 11 | upsert_dataset() preserves ai_description on re-pull | VERIFIED | db.py lines 366-368: subquery `(SELECT ai_description FROM datasets WHERE id = ?)` in INSERT OR REPLACE |

**Plan 02 truths (FIELD-02, FIELD-03)**

| # | Truth | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|--------|----------|
| 12 | enrich-fields --dry-run displays eligible dataset count, column count, estimated cost, and per-dataset table without making API calls | VERIFIED | cli.py lines 520-559: computes totals + cost estimate, prints Rich Table, returns before any API call |
| 13 | enrich-fields --limit 5 enriches only 5 datasets | VERIFIED | cli.py lines 516-517: `if limit is not None: eligible = eligible[:limit]` |
| 14 | enrich-fields --resume silently skips already-enriched datasets and shows skip count in summary | VERIFIED | cli.py lines 503-513: counts skipped from B+ total minus eligible, shown in summary panel |
| 15 | Progress line printed per dataset: 'Enriching {title} ({N} columns)... done [{current}/{total}]' | VERIFIED | cli.py lines 571-574, 592: exact format implemented |
| 16 | On API failure: retry once, then skip and continue; failures listed in end summary | VERIFIED | cli.py lines 594-643: try/except with time.sleep(2) retry, failed_datasets list printed as Rich Table |
| 17 | Dataset detail page shows AI-generated column descriptions with visible AI badge | VERIFIED | dataset.html lines 149-151: `{% if col.ai_description %}...{{ col.ai_description }}<span class="ai-badge">AI</span>` |
| 18 | ArcGIS alias descriptions still display when no AI description exists | VERIFIED | dataset.html lines 152-153: `{% elif col.description %}{{ col.description }}` fallback chain |

**Score: 18/18 truths verified**

## Anti-Patterns Found

Automated scan of all 8 modified files:

| File | Line | Pattern | Severity | Impact |
|------|------|---------|----------|--------|
| `enrichment/client.py` | 165 | `return {}` | INFO | False positive — early-return guard for `if not api_endpoint:` in _fetch_sample_values(); intentional design |
| `enrichment/client.py` | 198 | `return {}` | INFO | False positive — except handler return in best-effort sample fetch; intentional design |
| `site/static/style.css` | 161 | `.nav-search input::placeholder` | INFO | False positive — CSS pseudo-selector, not a code placeholder |

**No real anti-patterns found.** All flagged instances are intentional design choices documented in plan decisions.

---

## Human Verification Required

### 1. AI Badge Visual Appearance

**Test:** Generate a site export with a dataset that has both enriched and unenriched columns. Open the dataset detail page in a browser.
**Expected:** AI badge appears as a small, blue pill next to the AI-generated description. Unenriched columns show alias description with no badge. Columns with neither show "--".
**Why human:** Visual styling and font sizing cannot be confirmed programmatically.

### 2. enrich-fields --dry-run with Live Database

**Test:** Run `mdc-encyclopedia enrich-fields --dry-run` against a populated database with audit scores.
**Expected:** Rich table of eligible B+ datasets with columns, jurisdiction, grade, and estimated cost. No API calls made.
**Why human:** Requires a populated database with audit scores; programmatic test would need real data.

### 3. Retry Behavior on API Failure

**Test:** Simulate an API failure (e.g., invalid key) during an enrichment run.
**Expected:** First attempt fails, 2-second delay, retry, second failure logs warning and continues to next dataset. Failed datasets listed in final summary panel.
**Why human:** Requires intentionally triggering a network/API failure to verify retry path.
